sentences.arabic: أَصْبَحَ الذَّكَاءُ الِاصْطِنَاعِيُّ جُزْءًا كَبِيرًا مِنْ حَيَاتِنَا الْيَوْمِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Umjetna inteligencija postala je veliki dio našeg svakodnevnog života.
sentences.translationEn: Artificial intelligence has become a big part of our daily lives.

sentences.arabic: نَسْتَخْدِمُ هَذِهِ التِّقْنِيَةَ فِي الْهَوَاتِفِ الذَّكِيَّةِ وَالْحَوَاسِيبِ.
sentences.translation: Ovu tehnologiju koristimo u pametnim telefonima i računarima.
sentences.translationEn: We use this technology in smartphones and computers.

sentences.arabic: تُسَاعِدُ هَذِهِ الْبَرَامِجُ النَّاسَ فِي تَنْظِيمِ أَعْمَالِهِمْ بِسُرْعَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Ovi programi pomažu ljudima da brzo organizuju svoje poslove.
sentences.translationEn: These programs help people organize their work quickly.

sentences.arabic: كَمَا تُسَاهِمُ فِي تَطْوِيرِ الطِّبِّ وَالصِّنَاعَةِ.
sentences.translation: Također doprinosi razvoju medicine i industrije.
sentences.translationEn: It also contributes to the development of medicine and industry.

sentences.arabic: يَتَوَقَّعُ الْخُبَرَاءُ مُسْتَقْبَلًا بَاهِرًا لِهَذَا الْمَجَالِ.
sentences.translation: Stručnjaci predviđaju blistavu budućnost za ovu oblast.
sentences.translationEn: Experts predict a brilliant future for this field.
